rationale: In the citing paper, Ascarza (2018) appears only once in a grouped list of example target-marketing applications ("reducing churn") alongside several unrelated studies. The paper does not discuss Ascarza's arguments, findings, design, or targeting framework when developing its theory, algorithm, simulations, or empirical donor application. Because the citation serves as a broad background example rather than informing the core methodological contribution, its role is a passing mention.
